name: Obolo
notes: STUB: the grapheme inventory of Obolo is NOT yet specified (graphemes/allophones are empty). Obolo (Andoni) is a Cross River (Atlantic-Congo) language of Rivers and Akwa Ibom States, Nigeria, written in the Latin script with additional letters and a tonal system. INPUT CONTRACT: Latin-script Obolo orthography. No ISO 639-3 or Glottolog code is recorded for this Wikimedia code in Wikidata, so those fields are null. wikidata_qid left unset: the code's Wikidata row resolves to the Wikimedia project item, not the language item; not recorded rather than record a wrong id.
